mensaje.noEsFamilia: The selected item in the tree view is not a main family.
mensaje.seguroEliminar: Are you sure you want to delete the family?
mensaje.EsFamilia: The selected item is a main family.
mensaje.noEsHijoDirecto: The selected item is not a direct child.
mensaje.seguroEliminarHijo: Are you sure you want to remove the child?
mensaje.yaContienePermiso: The family already contains the permission.
mensaje.yaAsignadaAPerfil: Cannot assign a family already assigned to a profile.
mensaje.mismaFamilia: A family cannot be added to itself.
mensaje.yaContienePermisosDeFamilia: The family already contains permissions held by the family you are trying to add.
mensaje.yaContieneLaFamilia: The family already contains the family you are trying to add.
mensaje.familiaJerarquia: A family that contains the family you are trying to assign already holds permissions held by the family you are trying to add.
mensaje.permisoJerarquia: A family that contains the family to which you are trying to assign the permission already has the permission.
mensaje.circular: The family you are trying to add already contains the base family.
mensaje.familiasRepetidas: The family you are trying to add contains one or more families already present in the base family's hierarchy.
mensaje.familiaVacia: The family you want to add cannot be empty.
